query:
SELECT p.name AS project, c.name AS contact, c.title, c.company, c.roleBucket, c.source
FROM contacts c
JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.contactId = c.id
JOIN projects p ON p.id = cp.projectId
WHERE p.id IN (570022, 690089)
  AND c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready'
  AND c.company NOT LIKE '%atlascopco%'
  AND (c.email IS NULL OR c.email NOT LIKE '%@atlascopco.com%')
ORDER BY p.id, c.roleBucket
LIMIT 20;

LIMIT 20;
